steps.name: Sawing stick and shaping the staff
Oiling staff.  Watching the proverbial paint dry

steps.name: Drawing out steel and forging bands using drift as a mandrel
Normalizing the steel rings
Heating and quenching the caps and rings to harden them against impacts
Grinding and filing the bands to remove scale and shape them
Lining bands with strong glue.  Wedging bands into wood.  Cold driving them in place
Drawing out steel and forging bands using drift as a mandrel
Normalizing the steel rings
Heating and thorough quenching rings
Grinding scale off roughly to observe temper colours
Tempering
Grinding and filing the bands to remove scale and shape
Carefully chiseling bands to fit perfectly in the staff.  Chiseling intricate motifs on each band
Lining bands with strong glue.  Wedging bands into wood.  Cold driving them in place
